queries.name: date_add_days
queries.cypher: RETURN date_add('day', date('2024-01-01'), 10) AS result

queries.name: date_add_months
queries.cypher: RETURN date_add('month', date('2024-01-31'), 3) AS result

queries.name: date_add_years
queries.cypher: RETURN date_add('year', date('2020-02-29'), 4) AS result

queries.name: date_add_hours
queries.cypher: RETURN date_add('hour', date('2024-06-15'), 36) AS result

queries.name: date_diff_days
queries.cypher: RETURN date_diff('day', date('2024-01-01'), date('2024-03-15')) AS diff_days

queries.name: date_diff_months
queries.cypher: RETURN date_diff('month', date('2023-03-01'), date('2024-09-01')) AS diff_months

queries.name: date_diff_years
queries.cypher: RETURN date_diff('year', date('2000-01-01'), date('2024-01-01')) AS diff_years

queries.name: date_diff_hours
queries.cypher: RETURN date_diff('hour', date('2024-01-01'), date('2024-01-02')) AS diff_hours

queries.name: date_trunc_year
queries.cypher: RETURN date_trunc('year', date('2024-07-15')) AS truncated

queries.name: date_trunc_month
queries.cypher: RETURN date_trunc('month', date('2024-07-15')) AS truncated

queries.name: date_part_year
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('year', date('2024-07-15')) AS y

queries.name: date_part_month
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('month', date('2024-07-15')) AS m

queries.name: date_part_day
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('day', date('2024-07-15')) AS d

queries.name: date_part_quarter
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('quarter', date('2024-07-15')) AS q

queries.name: extract_alias
queries.cypher: RETURN extract('month', date('2024-07-15')) AS m

queries.name: timestamp_add_hours
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_add('hour', timestamp('2024-01-01T12:00:00'), 5) AS result

queries.name: timestamp_add_days
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_add('day', timestamp('2024-01-01T00:00:00'), 7) AS result

queries.name: timestamp_add_minutes
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_add('minute', timestamp('2024-01-01T10:00:00'), 90) AS result

queries.name: timestamp_diff_hours
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_diff('hour', timestamp('2024-01-01T06:00:00'), timestamp('2024-01-01T18:00:00')) AS diff_hours

queries.name: timestamp_diff_days
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_diff('day', timestamp('2024-01-01T00:00:00'), timestamp('2024-01-15T00:00:00')) AS diff_days

queries.name: timestamp_year_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_year(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:00')) AS y

queries.name: timestamp_month_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_month(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:00')) AS m

queries.name: timestamp_day_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_day(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:00')) AS d

queries.name: timestamp_hour_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_hour(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:00')) AS h

queries.name: timestamp_minute_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_minute(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:00')) AS mi

queries.name: timestamp_second_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_second(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:45')) AS s

queries.name: timestamp_millisecond_part
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp_millisecond(timestamp('2024-07-15T10:30:45')) AS ms

queries.name: make_date
queries.cypher: RETURN make_date(2024, 7, 15) AS d

queries.name: make_timestamp
queries.cypher: RETURN make_timestamp(2024, 7, 15, 10, 30, 0) AS ts

queries.name: epoch_ms_roundtrip
queries.cypher: RETURN to_epoch_ms(timestamp('1970-01-01T00:00:01')) AS ms

queries.name: epoch_s_roundtrip
queries.cypher: RETURN epoch_s(0) AS epoch_start

queries.name: date_component_extractors_alias
queries.cypher: RETURN year(date('2024-07-15'))   AS y, month(date('2024-07-15'))  AS m, day(date('2024-07-15'))    AS d

queries.name: date_trunc_day
queries.cypher: RETURN date_trunc('day', timestamp('2024-07-15T14:32:10')) AS truncated

queries.name: date_trunc_hour
queries.cypher: RETURN date_trunc('hour', timestamp('2024-07-15T14:32:10')) AS truncated

queries.name: date_diff_chained
queries.cypher: RETURN date_diff('day', date_add('month', date('2024-01-01'), 6), date('2024-07-01')) AS gap_days

queries.name: interval_constructor_days
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('3 days') AS delta

queries.name: interval_constructor_word_mix
queries.cypher: RETURN duration('2 years 5 days') AS delta

queries.name: interval_to_years
queries.cypher: RETURN to_years(2) AS delta

queries.name: date_plus_interval
queries.cypher: RETURN date('2024-01-01') + interval('3 days') AS shifted

queries.name: date_minus_date_interval
queries.cypher: RETURN date('2024-01-10') - date('2024-01-01') AS delta

queries.name: timestamp_minus_timestamp_interval
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp('2024-01-03T00:00:00Z') - timestamp('2024-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS delta

queries.name: timestamp_plus_interval_preserves_time
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp('2024-01-01T12:00:00') + interval('2 days') AS shifted

queries.name: timestamp_minus_interval_preserves_time
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp('2024-01-03T12:00:00') - interval('2 days') AS shifted

queries.name: interval_plus_timestamp_preserves_time
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('2 days') + timestamp('2024-01-01T12:00:00') AS shifted

queries.name: timestamp_minus_timestamp_mixed_day_time
queries.cypher: RETURN timestamp('2024-01-03T12:00:00') - timestamp('2024-01-01T11:30:00') AS delta, date_part('day', timestamp('2024-01-03T12:00:00') - timestamp('2024-01-01T11:30:00')) AS days, date_part('minute', timestamp('2024-01-03T12:00:00') - timestamp('2024-01-01T11:30:00')) AS minutes

queries.name: interval_negative_fractional_minutes
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('-1.5 minutes') AS delta, date_part('minute', interval('-1.5 minutes')) AS minutes, date_part('second', interval('-1.5 minutes')) AS seconds

queries.name: interval_date_part_year
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('year', to_years(4)) AS years

queries.name: interval_date_part_quarter_week
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('quarter', to_months(14)) AS quarter, date_part('week', to_days(15)) AS week

queries.name: interval_mixed_day_time_canonicalization
queries.cypher: RETURN to_days(1) - to_hours(1) AS delta, date_part('day', to_days(1) - to_hours(1)) AS days, date_part('hour', to_days(1) - to_hours(1)) AS hours

queries.name: interval_mixed_month_day_signs
queries.cypher: RETURN to_months(1) - to_days(1) AS delta, date_part('month', to_months(1) - to_days(1)) AS months, date_part('day', to_months(1) - to_days(1)) AS days

queries.name: interval_unary_negate
queries.cypher: RETURN -to_days(2) AS delta, date_part('day', -to_days(2)) AS days

queries.name: interval_negative_time_parts
queries.cypher: RETURN -to_hours(2) AS delta, date_part('hour', -to_hours(2)) AS hours

queries.name: interval_negative_cross_day_parts
queries.cypher: RETURN -(to_hours(25) + to_minutes(30)) AS delta, date_part('day', -(to_hours(25) + to_minutes(30))) AS days, date_part('hour', -(to_hours(25) + to_minutes(30))) AS hours, date_part('minute', -(to_hours(25) + to_minutes(30))) AS minutes

queries.name: interval_plus_interval_same_type
queries.cypher: RETURN to_days(2) + to_days(3) AS delta, date_part('day', to_days(2) + to_days(3)) AS days

queries.name: interval_plus_interval_mixed_month_day
queries.cypher: RETURN to_months(1) + to_days(15) AS delta, date_part('month', to_months(1) + to_days(15)) AS months, date_part('day',   to_months(1) + to_days(15)) AS days

queries.name: interval_plus_interval_time_overflow_to_days
queries.cypher: RETURN to_hours(23) + to_hours(2) AS delta, date_part('day',  to_hours(23) + to_hours(2)) AS days, date_part('hour', to_hours(23) + to_hours(2)) AS hours

queries.name: interval_date_minus_interval
queries.cypher: RETURN date('2024-01-10') - interval('3 days') AS result

queries.name: interval_to_minutes_hour_normalize
queries.cypher: RETURN to_minutes(70) AS delta, date_part('hour',   to_minutes(70)) AS hours, date_part('minute', to_minutes(70)) AS minutes

queries.name: interval_to_milliseconds_second_normalize
queries.cypher: RETURN to_milliseconds(1500) AS delta, date_part('second',      to_milliseconds(1500)) AS seconds, date_part('millisecond', to_milliseconds(1500)) AS milliseconds

queries.name: interval_to_seconds_minute_normalize
queries.cypher: RETURN to_seconds(90) AS delta, date_part('minute', to_seconds(90)) AS minutes, date_part('second', to_seconds(90)) AS seconds

queries.name: interval_reverse_mixed_sign
queries.cypher: RETURN to_days(5) - to_months(1) AS delta, date_part('month', to_days(5) - to_months(1)) AS months, date_part('day',   to_days(5) - to_months(1)) AS days

queries.name: interval_mixed_month_day_time_signs
queries.cypher: RETURN to_months(1) - to_days(1) - to_hours(25) AS delta, date_part('month', to_months(1) - to_days(1) - to_hours(25)) AS months, date_part('day',   to_months(1) - to_days(1) - to_hours(25)) AS days, date_part('hour',  to_months(1) - to_days(1) - to_hours(25)) AS hours

queries.name: interval_zero_value
queries.cypher: RETURN to_seconds(0) AS delta

queries.name: interval_iso_roundtrip
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('P1Y2M3DT4H5M6S') AS delta

queries.name: interval_cast_from_string
queries.cypher: RETURN CAST('3 days' AS INTERVAL) AS delta

queries.name: interval_list_nested_stringification
queries.cypher: RETURN [to_days(1), to_hours(25), 'tag'] AS values

queries.name: interval_map_nested_stringification
queries.cypher: RETURN map(['day', 'hour'], [to_days(1), to_hours(25)]) AS parts

queries.name: interval_struct_nested_stringification
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_pack('day', to_days(1), 'hour', to_hours(25)) AS parts

queries.name: interval_struct_deep_nested_stringification
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_pack('nested', struct_pack('delta', to_days(1)), 'listy', [to_hours(25)]) AS parts

queries.name: interval_list_structural_equality
queries.cypher: RETURN [to_days(1), to_hours(25)] = [to_days(1), to_hours(25)] AS eq

queries.name: interval_struct_structural_equality
queries.cypher: RETURN struct_pack('day', to_days(1), 'hour', to_hours(25)) = struct_pack('day', to_days(1), 'hour', to_hours(25)) AS eq

queries.name: interval_list_contains_nested_membership
queries.cypher: RETURN list_contains([[to_days(1)], [to_days(2)]], [to_days(1)]) AS ok

queries.name: interval_list_unique_nested_values
queries.cypher: RETURN list_unique([[to_days(1)], [to_days(1)], [to_days(2)]]) AS vals

queries.name: interval_distinct_nested_lists
queries.cypher: UNWIND [[to_days(1)], [to_days(1)], [to_days(2)]] AS vals WITH DISTINCT vals RETURN vals ORDER BY tostring(vals)

queries.name: interval_count_distinct_nested_lists
queries.cypher: UNWIND [[to_days(1)], [to_days(1)], [to_days(2)]] AS vals RETURN count(DISTINCT vals) AS n

queries.name: interval_group_by_nested_lists
queries.cypher: UNWIND [[to_days(1)], [to_days(1)], [to_days(2)]] AS vals RETURN vals, count(*) AS n ORDER BY tostring(vals)

queries.name: interval_order_by_nested_lists
queries.cypher: UNWIND [[to_days(2)], [to_days(1)]] AS vals RETURN vals ORDER BY vals

queries.name: interval_topk_nested_lists
queries.cypher: UNWIND [[to_days(2)], [to_days(1)]] AS vals RETURN vals ORDER BY vals LIMIT 1

queries.name: interval_divide_integer
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('3 years 2 days 13 hours 2 minutes') / 3 AS delta, date_part('year', interval('3 years 2 days 13 hours 2 minutes') / 3) AS y, date_part('hour', interval('3 years 2 days 13 hours 2 minutes') / 3) AS h, date_part('minute', interval('3 years 2 days 13 hours 2 minutes') / 3) AS m, date_part('second', interval('3 years 2 days 13 hours 2 minutes') / 3) AS s

queries.name: interval_divide_negative_integer
queries.cypher: RETURN -interval('3 days 3 hours') / 3 AS delta, date_part('day', -interval('3 days 3 hours') / 3) AS d, date_part('hour', -interval('3 days 3 hours') / 3) AS h

queries.name: interval_extended_native_units
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('3 quarter') AS quarter, interval('3 decade') AS decade, interval('3 century') AS century, interval('3 millennium') AS millennium

queries.name: interval_fractional_month_family
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('1.5 month') AS month, interval('1.5 year') AS year, interval('1.5 quarter') AS quarter

queries.name: interval_time_literal_and_abbreviations
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('35:10:00') AS time_only, interval('1 year 12:00:00') AS trailing_time, interval('2 yrs 3 mons 4 d 5 h 6 m 7 s 8 ms 9 us') AS abbreviated

queries.name: interval_extended_calendar_parts
queries.cypher: RETURN date_part('year', interval('1234 years 5 months')) AS y, date_part('decade', interval('1234 years 5 months')) AS dec, date_part('century', interval('1234 years 5 months')) AS c, date_part('millennium', interval('1234 years 5 months')) AS mil, date_part('month', interval('1234 years 5 months')) AS m

queries.name: interval_ordered_comparisons
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('1 month') <= interval('30 days') AS month_le_30_days, interval('1 month') >= interval('30 days') AS month_ge_30_days, interval('1 month') < interval('31 days') AS month_lt_31_days, interval('30 days 1 hour') > interval('1 month') AS thirty_days_hour_gt_month

queries.name: interval_canonicalization_overflow
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('36500 days 2400 hours 3600000 milliseconds')

queries.name: interval_mixed_sign_evaluations
queries.cypher: RETURN interval('1 month - 20 days 5 hours'), interval('-1 year 2 months -10 days'), date('2026-06-15') + interval('1 month - 40 days')

queries.name: interval_leap_year_extrema
queries.cypher: RETURN date('2024-02-29') + interval('1 year'), date('2024-02-29') + interval('4 years'), date('2026-01-31') + interval('1 month')
